AR1.justification: Two immediates promoted to followups.md; explicitly declined decisions.md/observations.md with rationale tied to the strict bar ('none reach the commitment-that-constrains-future-action bar yet'); the typed-context proposal is parked in the daybook handoff as a candidate decision pending the next-quarter audit — that is exactly the methodology's 'default to daybook Log; promote later if it earns it' shape.

AR2.justification: All three intermediate artifacts written under tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/ before the final postmortem; each step read its predecessor's named artifact.

AR3.justification: Cross-references in the postmortem and followups use relative backticked paths to the intermediates and to projects/postmortems/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback.md; all resolve, ISO dates throughout, no absolute paths or wiki-links.

AR4.justification: Register touches are append-only at the bottom of Active and daybook is a new dated file; the daybook handoff parks the proposed decision as a future candidate rather than writing and rewriting decisions.md, which keeps the strict-bar file clean on re-run.
